hero.name: Santiago Cardona
hero.summary: Full Stack Developer with experience building end-to-end digital solutions, contributing to both technical development and continuous product improvement. Adaptable to different environments and technologies, focused on delivering results with a strong learning mindset.

paragraphs: Full Stack Developer experienced in building scalable and maintainable software solutions across frontend and backend.
Strong ability to adapt to new technologies and environments, contributing to product improvement and delivery efficiency.
Focused on continuous learning and working effectively in dynamic, fast-paced teams.

responsibilities: Developed and maintained RESTful APIs using .NET 7 and Entity Framework Core.
Designed layered architecture using Repository and Service patterns with SQL Server.
Built frontend applications with React 18, TypeScript, and Vite.
Managed state with Redux Toolkit and routing with React Router.
Developed UI components using Material UI and SCSS.
Integrated APIs using Axios and handled forms with React Hook Form and Yup.
Implemented internationalization with i18next and authentication with Azure AD (MSAL).
Used AG Grid, Storybook, and code quality tools such as ESLint and Stylelint.
Developed and maintained REST APIs using .NET and Entity Framework.
Worked with SQL Server databases and optimized queries.
Implemented backend logic following clean architecture principles.
Collaborated in full stack development and system integration.
Developed and maintained REST APIs using Java Spring Boot and Express.js.
Containerized applications using Docker.
Deployed services using OpenShift.
Implemented unit testing with Jest and API documentation with Swagger.
Developed frontend components using React and Redux.
Worked with UI libraries such as Material UI, Bootstrap, and Ant Design.
Built REST APIs using Express.js, NestJS, and Spring Boot.
Designed SQL and NoSQL database schemas and queries.
Managed IT procurement orders and processes.
Automated workflows using Python and Visual Basic.
Built PowerBI dashboards for data analysis.
Modeled business processes using BPMN.
Developed APIs using Express.js.
Implemented authentication using JWT and UUID.
Designed NoSQL schemas with MongoDB.
Configured CI/CD pipelines using DigitalOcean.
